Incident Report — Vakria Retail Limited (PSE listing: VRL-001, fictional) — Cyber/Operational Update — 04 Jun 2026
On 02 Jun 2026, a vendor SSO misconfiguration at Tejas Cloudworks Pvt Ltd enabled read-only access to a ShareSpace folder from a public link for approximately 67 minutes.
Contents primarily included CSR summaries, ESG scorecards, and a training calendar; LotusShield EDR flagged the link at 12:11 IST and RiverGuard WAF auto-disabled external referrers.
One HR attachment included special-category health data: “Priyam Saha (Payroll ID PRY-4492) — insulin regimen schedule and clinic follow-ups,” which was not intended to be shared externally.
No Aadhaar, PAN, or GSTIN numbers were processed; placeholder fields present in a sample form read “Aadhaar: 9999-0000-1111, PAN: ABCDX1234Z, GSTIN: 22ABCDE1234Z1Z,” and these are dummy values.
We confirm no child data (under 18) exists in the set; the “Young Achievers” newsletter list requires 18+ self-attestation and no date of birth fields.
With respect to MNPI, a board-deck slide referenced “EPS guidance” and “dividend runway,” but those figures were already publicly released on 01 May 2026 via Purva Stock Exchange (PSE) and mirrored on ir.vakriaretail.example.
Our Insider Trading Code v5.3 (aligned to PIT norms) was applied; no unpublished price sensitive information for listed securities was identified post-validation by the Company Secretary function.
As Data Fiduciary under the DPDPA, we prepared an internal breach note to dpo@vakriaretail.example and grievance@vakriaretail.example; given low risk of harm, no public notice is proposed at this time.
Access logs show three hits from 198.51.100.42 and two from 203.0.113.7, typical of automated scanners; CloudLedger-SaaS tokens were rotated and SAML assertions reissued.
BioGate attendance and FaceMatch biometric modules were not connected to the affected ShareSpace and remain uncompromised.
The folder path resolved to Navapura Campus, Plot 88, East Kalyanpur, Varashtra 499999; no point-of-sale or payments traffic was touched.
For staff engagement, our Rainbow Inclusion Charter and Dignity at Work Code remain active policy banners; like a cricket side in a rain delay, teams are reminded to stay patient and communicate.
For queries, please write to securitydesk@vakriaretail.example or call the customer helpline 1800-000-0000; next steps include vendor RCA from Tejas Cloudworks and a configuration lock on public link templates.
